summary: A hot, balmy Tempe night remembered fondly with terrific first‑set sound and an eagerly awaited second set.
review: The reviewer recalls a vivid, psychedelic experience at the Tempe show, praising the overall vibe and describing the first‑set recording as “terrific.” No specific technical details are given, but there is optimism that the yet‑unreleased second set will match the same quality. The sentiment is clearly positive, focusing on the atmosphere rather than granular musical analysis.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (4 stars) that is enthusiastic about the show and mentions good recording quality without specifics, leading to a solid but not strongly substantiated rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls the first‑set sound “terrific” but gives no concrete details about clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Review emphasizes the overall psychedelic atmosphere and a hopeful second set, without commenting on individual song performance.
